data_source: Web-grounded expected_tasks marked `wishlist_buy_now_web_verified` were sourced from Gemini Deep Research runs on 2026-05-02. See backend/eval/deep_research_prompts.md → Shopping Prompts 8/9/10/11.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy AirPods Max Gen 2 at Apple India for ₹67,900 — launched 16 Mar 2026, deliveries rolled out across India early April. H2 chip, USB-C lossless, Adaptive Audio, Apple Intelligence Live Translation. Profile already deeply in Apple ecosystem; existing AirPods Pro (gen 1).
expected_tasks.notes: Re-verify when iPhone 18 / next major Apple event nears — pricing stable until then.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Theragun Mini (3rd Gen) on Amazon.in at ₹19,999 — currently at all-time floor price (down from historical high ₹72,844 and 6-month average ₹24,667). Massive 72% market correction; algorithmic anomaly likely to recalibrate upward. Profile lists wishlist + actively trains for TCS World 10K.
expected_tasks.notes: Time-sensitive — the price-floor anomaly is fragile.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Nothing Phone 3 (12GB/256GB Black) on Flipkart/Amazon.in at ₹54,999 — launched 1 Jul 2025 at MRP ₹84,999; current price stabilized at 35% below MRP. Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 flagship, IP68, 5500mAh + Glyph LED. Profile lists as 'curiosity, not replacement' wishlist item.
expected_tasks.notes: Stable at current price; further drops minimal until end-of-life.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Nicobar 'Nawab Shirt - Olive' (pure linen) at Nicobar.com for ₹5,750 — currently in stock as part of the active Ganga Collection (May 2026 launch). Profile wishlist explicitly: 'Olive linen shirts from Nicobar'.
expected_tasks.notes: Independent label — rapid size depletion expected on new-collection drops; no markdowns on new-season items.

expected_skips.summary: Dad's email about ICICI Lombard insurance renewal is admin/finance content — not a shopping trigger; no wishlist item involved. Agent must NOT rephrase as 'Buy a new insurance policy'.
HR Labor Day holiday FYI — a long weekend is not a shopping trigger.
Mom's relational check-in is not a shopping trigger.

Do NOT emit a buy nudge for the Loewe Puzzle bag (small, tan). Listed at full price ₹3,63,800 at Loewe Mumbai / Le Mill; no markdowns on core continuity colours. Acquisition is personal-liquidity-driven, not retail-calendar-driven.
Do NOT emit a buy nudge for the Le Creuset 4.5L Cerise Dutch Oven. Listed at ₹29,500 at Tata CLiQ Luxury; no EOSS/factory-outlet on iconic Cerise. Brand maintains rigid pricing.
Do NOT emit `Buy via Myntra EORS` today. Sale runs 25 May → 7 Jun 2026; the right action today is wishlist-prep, not buy. Surface as countdown when sale opens.
Do NOT emit ShopBop sale tasks today. Spring Style Event concluded mid-April; next event projected late September. Cross-border 40%+ duty makes off-sale ShopBop economically unviable.
Do NOT emit Amazon Great Indian Festival tasks today. Sale runs 27 Sep → 25 Oct 2026 (Prime early access from Sep 26). 5 months out — surface only as the date approaches.

Do NOT emit `Wait for Apple Back-to-School to buy AirPods Max 2`. The B2S promo (Jun 17 - end Sep 2026) bundles a free base AirPods/Pencil with a Mac/iPad purchase; it does NOT discount standalone AirPods Max 2. Aditi already owns a MacBook Air and has no Mac/iPad in her wishlist, so the promo provides ZERO leverage.
expected_skips.notes: Tempting to suggest 'wait for back-to-school' but mechanically wrong for her standalone AirPods Max 2 purchase.

personas.notes: Friday May 1. Three-email slice has zero shopping triggers — but web research surfaces 4 wishlist items on actionable terms (AirPods Max 2 launched, Theragun Mini at floor price, Nothing Phone 3 at -35% MRP, Nicobar Olive in active Ganga Collection). Plus 5 wait/skip targets for items with no current sale window.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Leica Q3 (Black) at Leica India authorized dealer for ₹7,15,000. Domestic procurement is economically + logistically superior to US grey-market import (~₹7,68,660 landed cost after 25-26% duties). Mumbai dealer has constrained inventory; book a visit on his Mumbai Jun trip.
expected_tasks.notes: Profile wishlist: Leica Q3. Q3 43 (₹7,60,000) and Q3 Monochrom (₹7,75,000) are alternates worth considering at the dealer visit.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones (2nd Gen) at Bose India for ₹49,900 — launched Q2 2026, H2 chip equivalent + ActiveSense AI noise suppression + BT 5.4 + USB-C 24-bit. Profile wishlist: Bose noise-cancelling for travel.
expected_tasks.notes: Domestic warranty + service network justifies premium over $399 US price.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Forest Essentials new Sandalwood collection direct from forestessentialsindia.com — 2026 launches include Body Massage Oil Sandalwood & Saffron (₹1,295), Facial Mask Chandan Varnya Lepa (₹1,975), Body Mist Sandalwood & Vetiver (₹2,975 / ₹1,350), Sandalwood & Orange Peel Shaving Cream (₹950). Direct-to-consumer guarantees freshest cold-pressed batches. Profile match: Forest Essentials Sandalwood range explicitly on wishlist.
expected_tasks.notes: Brand under Estée Lauder global acquisition closing H2 2026 — inventory may tighten.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy from Good Earth's active Naadia Collection (chogas, jackets, kurtas in leaf green / aqua / jade / anaar / aubergine / indigo) at goodearth.in — currently in season for Mitali. Profile: he buys for Mitali at Good Earth.
expected_tasks.notes: Diwali home/resin drops typically late Aug-Sep — handle as separate skip.

expected_skips.summary: Mitali's 'Sunday Breakfast Idea' is personal/social. Not a shopping trigger.
Sudipto's Saturday bridge invitation is a social plan. Not a shopping trigger.

Do NOT emit a `Buy ...` task for Satyajit Ray first editions today. Listings range ₹830 (AbeBooks Marie Seton, Cooper, Nyce) to quotation-based for signed Bengali editions on Bidcurios. Without a specific identified copy, the action is 'place watchlist alerts' (out-of-lane: requires manual scout to College Street + auction watchlist), not a direct buy.

Do NOT emit `Buy [artwork by Shailesh BR / Rekha Rodwittiya / Nataraj Sharma / Rathin Barman / Soumya Sankar Bose]`. Primary-market art acquisition requires direct gallery dialogue (Vadehra Delhi or Experimenter Kolkata/Mumbai), not online buy. The right action is `Book gallery visit on Mumbai Jun trip` — calendar/travel lane, not shopping.

Do NOT emit auction-buy tasks today. Christie's 'Sublime Shadows' London is 11 Jun 2026; Sotheby's Asia Week is September. Auction acquisition requires watchlist + private treaty discussions, not direct buy. Re-evaluate ~3 weeks before each sale.
Do NOT emit `Wait for Forest Essentials Diwali sale` today. Diwali festive sale window is October 2026; surface as the date approaches. Summer Sale (June 2026) is a smaller window.
Do NOT emit India Art Fair 2027 tasks today. IAF 18th edition is Feb 4-7, 2027 in New Delhi. VIP Preview access dialogue with galleries opens late 2026; today is too early.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy the Wilson Profile XD Men's Graphite Complete Set from Golf Mart India at ₹49,490 — best current price for an all-graphite beginner-suitable configuration. Profile says he's considering taking up golf; the all-graphite shaft is biomechanically appropriate for a 55-year-old beginner.
expected_tasks.notes: Sourced from Gemini Deep Research (Shopping Prompt 10). Comparable retailers price it ₹55K–59K, so Golf Mart India is the best current arbitrage. Re-verify in Aug 2026.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Vortex Diamondback HD 10x42 binoculars from Fotocart at ₹28,000 — best current price; HD multi-coated optics are well-matched to live cricket viewing under day-night floodlight transitions. Profile lists 'high-quality binoculars for cricket matches' on wishlist.
expected_tasks.notes: Bushnell Legend (~₹35,921 incl GST) and Nikon Monarch M7 (~₹45,950) are the alternates. Vortex hits the optimal price/optics intersection. Re-verify in Aug 2026.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy the iPhone 17 (256GB) from Apple India at ₹82,900 — current flagship on A19 silicon. Profile says he buys the latest iPhone but only uses basic apps; the baseline 17 (not 17 Pro) matches that usage and the 17e is a step-down with weaker thermal/neural specs.
expected_tasks.notes: iPhone 18 expected Sept 2026 — once announced, the 17's price will move and this expectation should be re-pulled. Trade-in via Apple's program adds ₹3.1K–₹62.7K depending on legacy device.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy traditional ethnic wear from Jade Blue's active Spring Summer Sale (up to 50% off). Profile lists Jade Blue as a primary brand (formals + festive). Use prepaid online for an additional 5% structural discount.
expected_tasks.notes: Spring Summer Sale window is currently active — confirmed end date varies by year, conservatively assume late July. Jade Blue's regional retail strategy uses aggressive mid-year liquidation, contrasted with Manyavar's Diwali-only discount window.

expected_skips.summary: Nilesh's 'Final review of FY25 Audit' email is professional work correspondence. Not a shopping trigger; no wishlist item involved.

Do NOT surface 'Buy ICC World Cup 2027 tickets' or any tickets-on-sale buy task today — the official ballot has not opened (typically opens 12–18 months before tournament; tournament is Oct/Nov 2027 in Africa). Pre-registration with travel syndicates is itself NOT a shopping buy action. Wait for the public ballot.
expected_skips.notes: Profile bucket-list: live cricket at Lord's / MCG. London-Jul-2026 trip already includes a booked match. The 2027 World Cup is the next bucket-list opportunity but not on sale yet. Re-evaluate when ICC announces ballot dates.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT surface 'Buy from Manyavar pre-Diwali sale' today. Manyavar runs a strict scarcity model and discounts only open in late Sept / early Oct 2026. Today is May — far outside the sale window. Defer.
expected_skips.notes: Re-evaluate around 2026-09-15 when Manyavar's pre-Diwali window typically opens.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT surface 'Buy at IJS Ahmedabad jewellery exhibition (Jun 26–28, 2026)' as a shopping-agent task. Attending an exhibition is calendar/events lane; the actual buy decision happens at the booth. Shopping agent should NOT pre-create a buy nudge for an exhibition that hasn't started.
expected_skips.notes: Could become a calendar/events expected_task; stays a skip in shopping until a specific item-to-buy is identified.

expected_skips.summary: Profile lists wishlist items beyond what deep research surfaced (e.g. specific HDFC Diners Club Black points-eligible items). For wishlist items WITHOUT a current sale-alert / price-drop / restock email AND WITHOUT a web_search-verified buy-now status, the agent must NOT surface buy nudges from the wishlist alone. Only the four web-verified items above (golf set, binoculars, iPhone 17, Jade Blue sale) are valid triggers today.

personas.notes: STEADY-STATE — Mailbox slice has no shopping-domain emails. The 4 expected_tasks are sourced from a Gemini Deep Research run on 2026-05-02 (see backend/eval/deep_research_prompts.md → Shopping Prompt 10) and depend on web_search hitting the same retailer pages — re-verify when valid_until expires.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Skechers GO WALK Arch Fit 2.0 Women's at Skechers India for ₹4,949 — currently 45% off (was ₹8,999). Podiatrist-certified arch support engineered for 14-hour standing shifts. Profile match: Skechers Arch Fit explicitly on wishlist + medical resident on long shifts.
expected_tasks.notes: Stipend-friendly tier (₹3K-10K, needs saving). Sale liquidation is time-sensitive.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask (8g Mini, Berry) at Nykaa for ₹540 — currently 10% off; alternative Berry Bliss Lip Duo Mini combo at ₹1,148. Profile match: Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask on wishlist; combats hospital HVAC dehydration.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT emit `Buy Littmann Cardiology IV today`. Currently full price ₹21,300 (Smart Medical Buyer / Amazon.in); flag at Amazon Great Indian Festival (Sep 26) for No Cost EMI / sale price. Profile match (wishlist) but not a buy-now today.
expected_skips.notes: Stipend-tight; ₹21K is a major purchase. Wait for GIF or dedicated medical-supplier sale.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT emit `Buy iPad Air M4 today`. Standard education price ₹59,900 + Apple Pencil Pro ₹10,900 = ₹70,800 — major capital drain. Apple Back-to-School (mid-June 2026) bundles the Apple Pencil Pro free with iPad Air, saving ₹10,900. Wait.
Do NOT emit Anuv Jain Mumbai concert tasks. The Dastakhat Mumbai date concluded 2026-02-14 — before the eval window. Profile lists 'currently saving for' but the specific show is past.
expected_skips.notes: Cross-references with events.json's matching skip target.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT emit Nykaa Pink Friday Sale tasks today. Confirmed window 16-25 Nov 2026 (50-60% off major beauty brands). 6 months out — surface only as date approaches.
Do NOT emit H&M EOSS tasks today. Sale starts 30 May 2026 (or mid-June per Meera's source); 4-6 weeks out. Surface as countdown when sale opens.
Do NOT emit Amazon Great Indian Festival tasks today. Sale Sep 26 → Oct 25 2026 (Prime early access from Sep 26). 5 months out.
Do NOT emit Apple Back-to-School standalone tasks today. Sale launches mid-June 2026 (June 17 projected). Eligible via UNiDAYS for university students.

Do NOT emit a generic `Buy Decathlon clearance` task. Clearance is continuously updated, no specific item-to-buy identified. Becomes a task only when paired with a specific need (e.g. running shoes after a long-run injury).

personas.notes: Profile-only persona — no Gmail/Calendar OAuth. Despite empty fixture, deep research surfaces 2 stipend-friendly buy-now items (Skechers ₹4,949 -45%, Laneige ₹540 -10%) and 8 wait/skip targets (Littmann full price, iPad B2S wait, Anuv Jain past, Pink Friday Nov, H&M EOSS late May, Amazon GIF Sep, Apple B2S June, Decathlon vague). Task source = web_search; profile alone is not sufficient (the agent's binding constraint), but for backfill the deep-research-grounded 2 buys are defensible because they reference SPECIFIC profile wishlist items + verifiable current sale prices.
